hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_])(ssh|scp|rsync)([[:space:]]).*(boop_deploy|boop@boop\.planforadventure\.com|@178\.105\.87\.21)' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'BOOP-OK' && echo 'BLOCKED: command targets the Boop server. Re-run with the token BOOP-OK in the command (e.g. as a trailing comment) to confirm intent.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*hcloud[[:space:]]+(server|firewall|ssh-key|volume|load-balancer)[[:space:]]+(delete|remove)' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'HETZNER-OK' && echo 'BLOCKED: hcloud destructive command. Re-run with the token HETZNER-OK in the command to confirm.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git add (-A|\.|\*)([[:space:]]|$)' && echo 'BLOCKED: stage specific files only — git add -A / . / * is forbidden. Public repo, PII risk per CLAUDE.md.' >&2 && exit 2 || exit 0
